goal: Implement the first local Agent Session Observability contract and audit surface.
risk: AOF may keep final artifacts auditable while the live AI work path remains unreconstructable by humans and release reviewers.
loss_boundary: Do not claim v7.0 session observability unless AI work can link to task, requirement, test evidence, risk candidate, decision candidate, and release-ready evidence.
acceptance_gates: Session event record schema exists and validates core event types.
Runtime event stream schema exists and requires task, requirement, test evidence, risk, decision, and release readiness links.
Local writer command creates a schema-valid event stream.
Session observability audit fails missing required links and passes complete streams.
evidence_plan: Use schemas, writer command, audit command, TASK-085 readiness record, Council review, and focused tests as local evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop if audit cannot prove the six linkage requirements without semantic overclaiming.
